title: French Stracciatella-Cheese Terrine
description: A spicy and crispy French dish made with stracciatella cheese, namul blanch season, and plant-based friendly ingredients. Serve as a side dish or as a main course.
instructions: Cut the whole wheat bread into 1-inch cubes and toast in the oven for 5 minutes.
In a blender or food processor, mix together the stracciatella cheese, namul blanch season, garlic, fresh thyme, salt, black pepper, and chili flakes until well combined.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the plant-based milk and olive oil.
Add the toasted bread cubes to the blender or food processor and mix until the bread is broken down and the mixture is well combined.
Pour the mixture into a terrine dish or a small loaf pan and smooth the top.
Pour the milk and oil mixture over the bread mixture and smooth the top again.
Bake the terrine in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the terrine is set.
Let the terrine cool to room temperature before serving.
Serve the terrine at room temperature, garnished with additional fresh thyme if desired.
